item.title: Qt6Gtk2 [Qt Components]
item.itunes:title: Qt6Gtk2 [Qt Components]
item.itunes:author: trialuser
item.itunes:summary:
Qt6Gtk2
(Qt Components)
Qt6Gtk2 - GTK+2.0 integration plugins for Qt6
[b]Requirements[/b]
- GNU Linux or FreeBSD
- qtbase >= 6.0.0 (with private headers)
- GTK+ 2.0
- libX11

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://github.com/trialuser02/qt6gtk2/releases[/url]
[read more]

item.title: Publisher Barcode Label Maker Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Publisher Barcode Label Maker Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: businessbarcode3
item.itunes:summary:
Publisher Barcode Label Maker Software
(Utilities)
Efficient Publisher Barcode Label Maker Software creates elegant looking barcode tags, stickers, rolls and labels that are used for library books. Technically sound barcode label creator program facilitates professionals as well as beginners to craft high resolution barcode sticker images using different image designing objects including image, text, line, rectangle, ellipse, picture and such other tools. Magnificent barcode image designing program provides option to save generated barcode stickers in different image file formats on your computer system at specified memory location.

[read more]
item.description:
Publisher Barcode Label Maker Software
(Utilities)
Efficient Publisher Barcode Label Maker Software creates elegant looking barcode tags, stickers, rolls and labels that are used for library books. Technically sound barcode label creator program facilitates professionals as well as beginners to craft high resolution barcode sticker images using different image designing objects including image, text, line, rectangle, ellipse, picture and such other tools. Magnificent barcode image designing program provides option to save generated barcode stickers in different image file formats on your computer system at specified memory location.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Publisher Barcode Label Maker Software
(Utilities)
Efficient Publisher Barcode Label Maker Software creates elegant looking barcode tags, stickers, rolls and labels that are used for library books. Technically sound barcode label creator program facilitates professionals as well as beginners to craft high resolution barcode sticker images using different image designing objects including image, text, line, rectangle, ellipse, picture and such other tools. Magnificent barcode image designing program provides option to save generated barcode stickers in different image file formats on your computer system at specified memory location.

[read more]

item.title: Fingrom [Financial]
item.itunes:title: Fingrom [Financial]
item.itunes:author: vlyskouski
item.itunes:summary:
Fingrom
(Financial)
The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

Features:
- Accounting
- Budget Categories
- Bills, Transfers, Incomes (Invoices)
- Goals Definition
- Exchange rates
- Metrics
- Synchronization between devices (P2P)
- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File
- Import from CSV, QIF, OFX files for Bills and Invoices
- Data encryption
- Localization
- Responsive and Adaptive Design
- Shortcuts

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).
[read more]
item.description:
Fingrom
(Financial)
The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

Features:
- Accounting
- Budget Categories
- Bills, Transfers, Incomes (Invoices)
- Goals Definition
- Exchange rates
- Metrics
- Synchronization between devices (P2P)
- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File
- Import from CSV, QIF, OFX files for Bills and Invoices
- Data encryption
- Localization
- Responsive and Adaptive Design
- Shortcuts

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Fingrom
(Financial)
The goal of the solution is to create a financial accounting application that is intuitive, efficient, and inclusive.
That empowers users to effortlessly manage their finances while ensuring that no one is left behind.

Features:
- Accounting
- Budget Categories
- Bills, Transfers, Incomes (Invoices)
- Goals Definition
- Exchange rates
- Metrics
- Synchronization between devices (P2P)
- Recovery via WebDav or a direct File
- Import from CSV, QIF, OFX files for Bills and Invoices
- Data encryption
- Localization
- Responsive and Adaptive Design
- Shortcuts

If you would like to come with suggestions, report bugs, translate the app, or contribute otherwise, feel free to reach out!

This is the "open-source code" application that welcomes and values contributions from the community. However, there are some limitations when it comes to making external modifications and distributions, as it follows the CC-BY-NC-ND-4.0 license. As the project's author, I am committed to upholding the "Terms of Use" and "Privacy Policy" to ensure the well-being and satisfaction of all users across all platforms (desktop, mobile, and web).

item.title: Android Tweaker Performance App [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: Android Tweaker Performance App [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: modulesx
item.itunes:summary:
Android Tweaker Performance App
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Android Tweaker is a powerful module that optimizes your Android device's kernel and RAM for a perfect balance between performance and battery life. Users can apply recommended settings to enhance multitasking, memory management, and gaming experience while extending battery life. The module supports EAS/HMP kernels, monolithic/hybrid architectures, and provides a simple optimization solution for all Android devices. Compatible with all ROMs, kernels, and processors, universal!

[read more]
item.description:
Android Tweaker Performance App
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Android Tweaker is a powerful module that optimizes your Android device's kernel and RAM for a perfect balance between performance and battery life. Users can apply recommended settings to enhance multitasking, memory management, and gaming experience while extending battery life. The module supports EAS/HMP kernels, monolithic/hybrid architectures, and provides a simple optimization solution for all Android devices. Compatible with all ROMs, kernels, and processors, universal!

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Android Tweaker Performance App
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Android Tweaker is a powerful module that optimizes your Android device's kernel and RAM for a perfect balance between performance and battery life. Users can apply recommended settings to enhance multitasking, memory management, and gaming experience while extending battery life. The module supports EAS/HMP kernels, monolithic/hybrid architectures, and provides a simple optimization solution for all Android devices. Compatible with all ROMs, kernels, and processors, universal!

[read more]

item.title: XvM Performance Tweaker App [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: XvM Performance Tweaker App [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: modulesx
item.itunes:summary:
XvM Performance Tweaker App
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
• One Click Overclocking
• CPU Booster
• GPU Tweaks
• V,Z Ram
• netTweaks+

Tweak CPU (Frequency, Governor, Voltage, Hotplug) and GPU (Frequency, Governor), the I/O Scheduler, Low Memory Killer, and Virtual Memory.

You can manually set & Change governor as per your preference like Performance - Battery & One Tap to overclock your cpu
[read more]
item.description:

(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))

• GPU Tweaks
• V,Z Ram

Tweak CPU (Frequency, Governor, Voltage, Hotplug) and GPU (Frequency, Governor), the I/O Scheduler, Low Memory Killer, and Virtual Memory.

You can manually set & Change governor as per your preference like Performance - Battery & One Tap to overclock your cpu
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
XvM Performance Tweaker App
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
• One Click Overclocking
• CPU Booster
• GPU Tweaks
• V,Z Ram
• netTweaks+

Tweak CPU (Frequency, Governor, Voltage, Hotplug) and GPU (Frequency, Governor), the I/O Scheduler, Low Memory Killer, and Virtual Memory.

You can manually set & Change governor as per your preference like Performance - Battery & One Tap to overclock your cpu

item.title: Business Barcode Software [Database]
item.itunes:title: Business Barcode Software [Database]
item.itunes:author: businessbarcode3
item.itunes:summary:
Business Barcode Software
(Database)
Require reliable application that is specially developed for making business barcode tags and labels? Download Business Barcode Software from www.businessbarcode.com site that provide facility to easily make tags, images with various bar code series creating options like sequential, random, and constant value series. Barcode images producing utility facilitates you to create easily readable and printable stickers.

[read more]

item.title: Business Cards Designing Program [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Business Cards Designing Program [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: invitecardsdesigne1
item.itunes:summary:
Business Cards Designing Program
(Office Apps)
Company offer www.invitationcardsdesigningsoftware.com to download Business Cards Designing Software helps to create bulk numbers of marketing cards using 2Dimensional and linear font features and save all designed cards at user defined location on computer for further usage. Card designing program uses sequential, random and constant generating series to create most versatile business cards. Business Cards creator software prints attractive corporate cards with advanced flexible printing setting.
[read more]

Card designing program uses sequential, random and constant generating series to create most versatile business cards. Business Cards creator software prints attractive corporate cards with advanced flexible printing setting.

item.title: Business Card Designing Program [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Business Card Designing Program [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: invitecardsdesigne1
item.itunes:summary:
Business Card Designing Program
(Office Apps)
Company presents Business Card Designing Program for those designers who want to create colorful business visiting cards for professional purposes in easiest manner. Invitation card designing utility consists of interactive graphical user interface helpful in designing business cards within just fraction of seconds. Card designing utility consists of predefined templates used to create visiting cards in fast manner.
[read more]
